package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for file_or_template_read_per_request: Request-path handlers that read files directly instead of using startup caching or dedicated file-serving paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule313NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule313NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule313NegativeRecord) (Rule313NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario313Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule313NegativeService, input Rule313NegativeRecord) (Rule313NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule313NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
